prompt: I just finished implementing the POST /api/alert-configs endpoint. 3 files changed: alertConfigService.js, alertConfigRoutes.js, alertConfig.test.js. The contract has 14 postconditions (PC-A1 through PC-A5, PC-S1 through PC-S7, PC-X1 through PC-X2). Run verification before I commit.
